notes: Example client config — customize for each client. Never use real names.

behavior_targets.name: aggression
behavior_targets.operational_definition: Any instance of hitting, kicking, biting, scratching, or hair pulling directed at another person's body with sufficient force to produce an audible sound or visible mark.

behavior_targets.name: elopement
behavior_targets.operational_definition: Any instance of leaving the designated therapy area (beyond arm's reach of the therapist) without permission, including running away from the table, leaving the room, or moving beyond the therapy boundary.

behavior_targets.name: property_destruction
behavior_targets.operational_definition: Any instance of throwing, breaking, ripping, or forcefully displacing objects from their intended location (e.g., sweeping materials off the table, throwing items, tearing worksheets).

behavior_targets.name: vocal_protest
behavior_targets.operational_definition: Any vocalization above conversational volume including crying, screaming, whining, or shouting lasting 3 or more seconds.

replacement_behaviors.name: functional_communication
replacement_behaviors.operational_definition: Any instance of using words, signs, or PECS to request a break, request an item, or express a need (e.g., saying 'break please', signing 'help', exchanging a break card).

replacement_behaviors.name: appropriate_waiting
replacement_behaviors.operational_definition: Remaining seated or standing in the designated area with hands and feet to self for a minimum of 5 seconds when instructed to wait.

skill_acquisition_targets.name: manding_for_items
skill_acquisition_targets.description: Client independently requests desired items using 1-2 word vocal mands

skill_acquisition_targets.name: following_1step_instructions
skill_acquisition_targets.description: Client follows simple 1-step motor instructions (e.g., 'sit down', 'give me', 'touch')
skill_acquisition_targets.mastery_criteria: 90% correct with no prompt across 2 consecutive sessions
